title: Users in the North America and Asia Pacific regions may see stale data in some Microsoft 365 Copilot usage reports
impact: Users in the North America and Asia Pacific regions may have seen stale data in some Copilot usage reports.

updates.content:
Title: Users in the North America and Asia Pacific regions may see stale data in some Microsoft Copilot usage reports

User impact: Users in the North America and Asia Pacific regions may see stale data in some Microsoft Copilot usage reports.

More info:  The affected Microsoft Copilot usage reports include:
 
- Microsoft 365 Copilot usage
- Microsoft 365 Copilot Chat usage
- Graph API - Microsoft 365 Copilot usage report

Current status: We’ve determined that an issue affecting an upstream dependent service is leading to latency in request execution times and resulting in the delayed data delivery. Data refresh for April 23rd is delayed and may exceed delivery expectations. We’ve initiated the process of deploying a fix to address the issue on the depending services and we’re monitoring the pipelines to ensure the issue is resolved as expected by our next scheduled update.

Scope of impact: Your organization is impacted by this event, and any users in the North America and Asia Pacific regions may see stale data in some Microsoft Copilot usage reports. This information may be updated as our investigation continues.
 
Root cause: An issue affecting an upstream dependent service is leading to latency in request execution times and resulting in the delayed data delivery.

Next update by: Wednesday, April 29, 2026, at 10:30 PM UTC

Title: Users in the North America and Asia Pacific regions may see stale data in some Microsoft 365 Copilot usage reports

User impact: Users in the North America and Asia Pacific regions may have seen stale data in some Copilot usage reports.

More info: The affected Copilot usage reports included:

- Microsoft 365 Copilot usage
- Microsoft 365 Copilot Chat usage
- Graph API - Microsoft 365 Copilot usage report

Final status: We've deployed our fix to address the issue occurring in our upstream dependent service and confirmed through monitoring service health telemetry that all data is up to date and the impact has been remediated.

Scope of impact: Any user in the North America and Asia Pacific regions may have seen stale data in some Copilot usage reports.

Start time: Monday, April 27, 2026, at 10:59 PM UTC

End time: Tuesday, April 28, 2026, at 2:11 AM UTC

Root cause: An issue affecting an upstream dependent service was leading to latency in request execution times and resulted in the delayed data delivery.

Next steps: 
- We're continuing to monitor the infrastructure associated with the upstream dependent service closely to gain further insight into the source of the underlying issue and better prevent similar impact in the future.

This is the final update for the event.
